creator: chuck@pkix.net
text:
Hi--
 
 On Mar 18, 2007, at 9:56 AM, Heiner wrote:
 > Known issues:
 > - k3b complains at startup about an outdated version of growisofs.  
 > Chuck
 > Swiger (the port maintainer of dvd+rw-tools) is cc'ed
 
 While I am not opposed to updating dvd+rw-tools to version 7.x, there  
 is a patch included with the current 6.1.x version which ought to be  
 forward-ported for the people using Bacula:
 
 > + * 6.1.1: (by Nicolas Boichat, Bacula project)
 > + * - Allow session to cross 4GB boundary regardless of medium type
 > + *   (don't need to have a DL media)
 > + * - Add a -F option (used instead of -M or -Z), which displays  
 > next_session
 > + *   offset and capacity (free space = next_session - capacity).
 
 -- 
 -Chuck
